basic.description: Well-known topics where LLM knowledge should be sufficient
topics: Why is the sky blue?
How does gravity work?
What is the Pythagorean theorem and why does it work?
How does a computer store data in binary?
Why does ice float on water?

intermediate.description: Topics that benefit from research for accuracy and depth
topics: How does mRNA vaccine technology work and how was it developed?
What is quantum entanglement and why did Einstein call it spooky?
How do large language models like GPT actually generate text?
What is CRISPR-Cas9 and what are its current medical applications?
How does the Federal Reserve control inflation through interest rates?

cutting_edge.description: Recent or niche topics that definitely need web search
topics: What are the latest breakthroughs in room-temperature superconductors?
How does OpenAI's o3 model differ from previous reasoning models?
What is the current state of nuclear fusion energy research in 2026?
How do diffusion models generate images and what are the latest improvements?
What is the Mpemba effect and what does recent research say about why it happens?

adversarial.description: Topics where the LLM might confidently get details wrong without research
topics: What is the exact current population of Tokyo and how has it changed in the last 5 years?
What are the specific side effects of the newest FDA-approved weight loss drugs?
What is the current world record for the 100m sprint and when was it set?
What programming language is the Linux kernel primarily written in and what version is the latest stable release?
How many planets have been confirmed by the James Webb Space Telescope?
